title: 2021年6月大学英语六级真题(第3套)

sections.title: Part I Writing
sections.directions: For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to write an essay based on the chart below. You should start your essay with a briXf description of the chart and comment on China's achievements in poverty alleviation. You should write at least 150 words but no more than 200 words.
